title: Zoro Cuts Through the War
description: Enel’s mantra lets him observe and judge the fighters as the priests, Shandia, and Straw Hats struggle through separate battles.
scene: Across pages 16, 17, this scene centers on Chopper, Luffy, Zoro, Wyper, Enel. Enel’s mantra lets him observe and judge the fighters as the priests, Shandia, and Straw Hats struggle through separate battles.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Only the weak raises his voice!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'm a monster!!! And I'm strong!!!

summary: Enel’s mantra lets him observe and judge the fighters as the priests, Shandia, and Straw Hats struggle through separate battles.
